zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anna Haggerston於1430年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德哈格斯東 卡素時，她的父親Thomas Haggerston16歲，母親Mary Selby13歲。她和Thomas Rotherforth II至少有1個兒子。她去世在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anna Haggerston was born in 1430, in Haggerston Castle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Haggerston, was 16 and her mother, Mary Selby, was 13. She had at least 1 son with Thomas Rotherforth II. She died in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anna Haggerston est née en 1430, à Haggerston Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Haggerston, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Mary Selby, avait 13 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Thomas Rotherforth II. Elle est décédée à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.Haggerston Castle, Haggerston, Berwick-U: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドハグジャーストン カストル

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anna Haggerstonが1430年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドハグジャーストン カストルで生まれた時，父Thomas Haggerstonは16歳，母Mary Selbyは13歳であった。彼女はThomas Rotherforth IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anna Haggerston(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 해그르스턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Haggerston(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Selby(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Rotherforth II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 사망했다.
